capabilities.description: Resolves aiostreams:// virtual paths into short-lived streaming URLs.

presentation.summary: Zero-storage virtual playback backed by dynamic AIOStreams resolution.
presentation.description_markdown: Resolves database-backed `aiostreams://` virtual media references into short-lived streaming URLs without storing media files in Silo.
presentation.setup_markdown: Install the plugin, then configure the secret AIOStreams manifest URL under plugin settings. Enable virtual playback for a Silo collection; local media remains preferred.

global_config_schema.title: AIOStreams
global_config_schema.description: Connection to the configured AIOStreams Stremio addon.

fields.label: Manifest URL
fields.description: The complete tokenized AIOStreams URL ending in /manifest.json.
